title: sanguisorba officinalis var. serpentini
intro: Sanguisorba officinalis var. serpentini, also known as the 'Red Squirrel' or 'Burnet', is a perennial herb belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Sanguisorba officinalis var. serpentini has anti-inflammatory, astringent, and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The health benefits of this plant include reducing bleeding, soothing irritated tissues, and supporting wound healing. Sanguisorba officinalis var. serpentini can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential interactions and side effects.
